allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); try { JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/activites.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('valid JSON'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Error:', e.message\); }")

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git push'; then npm test; RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Tests unitaires échoués — push annulé. Corrigez les erreurs avant de pousser."}'; exit 1; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'npm test'; then exit 0; fi; RESP=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_response // ""'); if echo "$RESP" | grep -qi 'failed'; then exit 0; fi; if ! echo "$RESP" | grep -q 'passed'; then exit 0; fi; CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain); if [ -z "$CHANGES" ]; then exit 0; fi; git add -A && git commit -m 'auto: push apres tests passes' && git push
